item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 94 pts (0.454) Buffalo Sabres – 92 pts (0.444) Tampa Bay Lightning – 88 pts (0.438) Pittsburgh Penguins – 84 pts (0.412) Montreal Canadiens – 84 pts (0.412) Boston Bruins – 84 pts (0.406) Detroit Red Wings – 84 pts (0.406) Columbus Blue Jackets – 83 pts (0.407) New York Islanders – 83 pts (0.401) Ottawa Senators – 79 pts (0.387) Philadelphia Flyers – 78 pts (0.382) Washington Capitals – 78 pts (0.371) New Jersey Devils – 72 pts (0.348) Florida Panthers – 71 pts (0.343) Toronto Maple Leafs – 71 pts (0.338) New York Rangers – 64 pts (0.309) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
